mapper.select: SELECT * FROM mq_relationships WHERE from_protocol = #{fromProtocol} AND from_topic = #{fromTopic} AND enabled = TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mq_relationships (id, name, from_protocol, from_topic, to_protocol, to_topic, key_template, value_template, delay_ms, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{fromProtocol}, #{fromTopic}, #{toProtocol}, #{toTopic}, #{keyTemplate}, #{valueTemplate}, #{delayMs}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE mq_relationships SET name = #{name}, from_protocol = #{fromProtocol}, from_topic = #{fromTopic}, to_protocol = #{toProtocol}, to_topic = #{toTopic}, key_template = #{keyTemplate}, value_template = #{valueTemplate}, delay_ms = #{delayMs}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
